name: MALPOSITION OF SEPTUM PRIMUM
definition: anomalous drainage of normally connected pulmonary veins ← leftward deviation / curvature

demographics.Associated with: complex congenital heart defects, heterotaxy, polysplenia

dominant_finding: ± left heart hypoplasia ← lack of left heart filling
discriminating_features: anomalous drainage of right upper pulmonary vein into RA
± left heart hypoplasia ← lack of left heart filling

general: anomalous drainage of right upper pulmonary vein into RA
± left heart hypoplasia ← lack of left heart filling

clinical.Rx: resection + repositioning of atrial septum in a more normal position
